'''Hensara III''', also known simply as '''Hensara''', was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] stolen [[Imperial Customs Frigate]] [[Battle of Yavin (starship)|''Battle of Yavin'']] was sunk in a deep lake on this planet to hide it from an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] patrol. The ''[[Eridain]]'' and [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] retrieved the ship's crew and defeated the Empire in the [[Rout of Hensara]].

{{Planet-stub}}
